summary.short: OpenAI agent systems research highlights a benchmark for long-form evaluation.
summary.long: The write-up explains a practical benchmark, implementation notes, and open production questions for agent systems.

key_points: The article presents a benchmark for evaluating long-form agent performance.
It includes implementation notes that make the benchmark easier to reproduce.
It raises concrete follow-up questions for production readiness.
why_it_matters: It gives the Inbox and Knowledge layers a concrete benchmark-oriented item that is worth preserving for later review.
note_draft:
## Key insight

This benchmark is useful because it turns long-form agent evaluation into a repeatable reference point for later experimentation.
